title: Postcode level electricity statistics: 2024
body: "Data is available for:   all domestic electricity meters standard meters economy 7 meters   Economy 7 is for customers that have an additional off-peak electricity period. Typically customers have a 7 hour off-peak period at night when their electricity is cheaper.  Please read the accompanying notes before using the statistics. "

taxons.title: Energy and climate change: evidence and analysis
